data.title: Ark Invest Adds Circle and Bullish Shares, Ark Invest Tracker Data Show
data.description:
Ark Invest increased its holdings in Circle and Bullish shares yesterday, based on tracking data.

According to Foresight News, Ark Invest Tracker data show that Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest bought 287,609 shares of Circle stock and 27,740 shares of Bullish stock.

data.title: Crypto Market Sees $450 Million in Liquidations Over 24 Hours, Coinglass Data Shows
data.description:
Crypto derivatives traders saw about $450 million in liquidations over the past 24 hours, with short positions accounting for $280 million and long positions $171 million.

According to ChainCatcher, the figures were based on Coinglass data.

Bitcoin liquidations included about $27.0 million in long positions and $125 million in short positions. Ethereum liquidations included about $20.1 million in longs and $67.6 million in shorts.

Coinglass data also showed 117,590 traders were liquidated globally over the same 24-hour period. The largest single liquidation order occurred on Hyperliquid in the XYZ:CL-USD market, totaling about $9.85 million.

data.title: STOCKS | Hong Kong Tech Stocks Rebound, Meituan Rises Nearly 7%
data.description:
Hong Kong-listed technology stocks rebounded, led by gains in several major internet names.

According to Jin10, Meituan (03690.HK) rose nearly 7%, while JD.com (09618.HK) gained more than 5%. Kuaishou (01024.HK) and Alibaba (09988.HK) also moved higher.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Hong Kong AI Application Stocks Diverge as Zhipu Drops Over 10%
data.description: Hong Kong-listed AI application stocks moved in different directions, with some names falling sharply while others rose strongly. According to Jin10, Zhipu (02513.HK) fell more than 10% and MINIMAX-W (00100.HK) dropped more than 6%, while Mobvista (01860.HK) gained more than 9% and Meitu (01357.HK) rose more than 8%.

data.title: STOCKS | Hong Kong-Listed Semiconductor Shares Open Lower
data.description:
Several Hong Kong-listed semiconductor stocks opened lower.

According to Jin10, GigaDevice Semiconductor (03986.HK) opened down 12.46%, Montage Technology (06809.HK) opened down 6.8%, and Semiconductor Manufacturing International Corp. (00981.HK) opened down 5.93%.

InnoScience (02577.HK) and Novosense Microelectronics (02676.HK) also fell at the open.

data.title: WORLD CUP | Balogun scores 45th-minute opener as US leads Bosnia-Herzegovina 1-0
data.description: Folarin Balogun scored in the 45th minute to give the United States a 1-0 lead over Bosnia-Herzegovina in their Round of 32 match on Wednesday night. Balogun had an earlier first-half goal overturned for offside before scoring again later in the half, and LeBron James reacted on social media to Balogun’s “Silencer” celebration, according to Yahoo Sports.

data.title: STOCKS | China Glass Substrate Shares Open Lower, Medike Drops Over 9%
data.description: China’s A-share glass substrate concept stocks opened lower in early trading. According to Jin10, Medike fell more than 9%, while JCET Group and BOE A declined more than 7%. Dier Laser, Delong Laser, and other related names also moved lower.

data.title: Australia Posts A$3.02 Billion Trade Deficit In May
data.description:
Australia recorded a goods and services trade balance of -A$3.02 billion in May.

According to Jin10, the market consensus expectation was a surplus of A$22.0 billion, compared with a prior reading of A$1.79 billion.

data.title: CICC: Stronger July–August Interim Results May Support A-Share Indexes
data.description: China International Capital Corp (CICC) said market attention has recently shifted toward style rebalancing as popular themes have seen high cumulative gains and elevated crowding, according to 36Kr. Overseas, after shipping resumed through the Strait of Hormuz, disruptions to crude supply eased and WTI fell to about $70 a barrel, reducing upward pressure on global inflation, CICC said, adding that Federal Reserve Chair Walsh’s monetary policy stance is still temporarily influencing investors’ expectations for US policy. Domestically, CICC said China’s A-share market is about to enter the interim-report season, and it expects better interim results in July and August to provide some support for indexes; it also said the earlier period of choppy consolidation and rapid style rotation may be nearing its end, with interim earnings gradually becoming the main investment theme.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Japan PM Takaichi Visits India to Deepen Ties as China Tensions Rise
data.description:
Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi arrived in India for a three-day trip aimed at deepening economic ties and strengthening security cooperation with Prime Minister Narendra Modi, according to Bloomberg.

The visit comes as tensions with China rise.

data.title: Hang Seng Index Futures Rise 0.84% to 23,033 at Day Session Open
data.description:
Hang Seng Index futures opened the day session up 0.84% at 23,033 points, with a premium of 143 points.

According to Jin10, the contract was trading above the underlying index by 143 points at the open.

data.title: Nissan CEO Says Alliance With Renault Has Never Been Better
data.description:
Nissan Motor Co.’s CEO said the automaker’s alliance with Renault SA “has never been better,” after Nissan lost a board member when Renault withdrew its support, according to Bloomberg.

Renault is Nissan’s alliance partner and top shareholder.

data.title: STOCKS | FTSE China A50 Index Futures Open Up 0.15%
data.description: FTSE China A50 index futures opened 0.15% higher. According to Jin10, the move was reported at the market open.

data.title: National Elderly Care Service Subsidy Launches on JD.com With 50% Instant Discount
data.description:
A national consumer subsidy for elderly care services has launched on JD.com, with the first e-commerce order placed in Beijing.

According to Jin10, starting July 1, eligible older adults can search for “elderly care subsidy” in the JD.com app and receive an instant 50% discount when purchasing frequently used in-home elderly care services, including assisted bathing, home cleaning, medical accompaniment, rehabilitation therapy, short-term care, and other services.

The subsidy program is being implemented by the Ministry of Civil Affairs and the Ministry of Finance. It targets older adults with moderate or more severe disability and provides support for in-home care, institutional care, respite services, and day care services.

The services launched on JD.com cover in-home elderly care. The subsidy can be used to offset 50% of the service cost, with a monthly cap of 800 yuan per person.

data.title: Bitwise Research Head Says Bitcoin May Bottom Before October as July Marks Potential Trend Shift
data.description:
Bitwise Europe research head André Dragosch said July appears to be a turning point for Bitcoin as it shifts from a bear market toward a bull market. According to Odaily, Dragosch added that if semiconductor stocks reverse sharply from current levels, the U.S. Federal Reserve may respond with a more dovish stance.

Dragosch said his base-case view is that Bitcoin is likely to bottom earlier than October, which he described as the timeframe widely expected by the market.

data.title: Japan’s 30-Year Government Bond Yield Rises 2.5 Basis Points to 3.980%
data.description: Japan’s 30-year government bond yield rose 2.5 basis points to 3.980%. According to Jin10, the move marked an increase in the long-term yield.

data.title: STOCKS | Hong Kong ADR Index Rises 302 Points as U.S. Stocks Fall
data.description:
Hong Kong stock ADRs rose 302 points, or 1.32%, to 23,183 even as U.S. stocks fell, according to Ming Pao.

Hong Kong index futures in after-hours trading gained 143 points, or 0.63%, to 22,990, implying a 109-point premium to the futures level.

data.title: Uniswap V2, V3, V4, and UniswapX Launch on Robinhood Chain
data.description:
Uniswap announced on X that Uniswap v2, v3, v4, and UniswapX are now live on Robinhood Chain, a Layer 2 network under Robinhood. According to PANews, Uniswap will serve as a major public automated market maker (AMM) on Robinhood Chain and said it has full support on day one from the Uniswap Web App, wallet, and API.

Uniswap said users can now swap tokens on Robinhood Chain, provide liquidity, buy stock tokens, and program AI agents through Uniswap.

The post added that Robinhood stock tokens on the network are fully transferable and support 24/7 trading.

data.title: Ashton Kutcher to Leave Sound Ventures and Launch New VC Fund With Morgan Beller
data.description:
Investor Ashton Kutcher is leaving Sound Ventures, the venture capital firm he co-founded, and plans to start a new venture fund with former NFX partner Morgan Beller, TechCrunch reported.

According to ChainCatcher, the move is primarily driven by differences in preferred investment stages. Sound Ventures has focused on backing more mature, leading AI companies, including OpenAI and Anthropic.

Kutcher’s new fund is expected to shift toward earlier-stage investing, with a focus on foundational technology areas such as AI infrastructure, energy, and deep tech. The split was described as amicable, and Kutcher will continue to serve as an advisor to Sound Ventures.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Holds Gains After Kevin Warsh Remarks Ease Fed Rate-Hike Prospects
data.description: Gold held onto gains after remarks by US Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh eased speculation the central bank may raise interest rates this year to tackle inflation, according to Bloomberg.
